query: UPDATE export_logs SET mlItemId = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(baselinkerResponse, '$.mlItemId')) WHERE status = 'success' AND baselinkerResponse IS NOT NULL AND mlItemId IS NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(baselinkerResponse, '$.mlItemId') IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Zv4Qvr7xnDv85L.fd0c5f77ba12 --database nQNUJejXd53raznAt7q8o4 --execute UPDATE export_logs SET mlItemId = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(baselinkerResponse, '$.mlItemId')) WHERE status = 'success' AND baselinkerResponse IS NOT NULL AND mlItemId IS NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(baselinkerResponse, '$.mlItemId') IS NOT NULL;
